---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A concise description of the feature you are proposing.

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this solve, or what use case does it enable? Why is this valuable for users of a client-side image compression tool?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature in detail. How would a user interact with it? What would change in the UI or behavior?

## Alternatives Considered

Are there other ways to solve this problem? Why is your proposed approach the best option?

## Constraints

compressimg is a zero-server, client-side-only tool. Please confirm your proposed feature:

- [ ] Does not require sending image data to a server
- [ ] Can be implemented using browser Web APIs (Canvas, Web Worker, OffscreenCanvas, etc.)
- [ ] Does not introduce Node.js server-side processing

## Additional Context

Screenshots, mockups, links to relevant browser API documentation, or any other context.
